title: Platanthera psycodes
taxonomy: Platanthera psycodes is classified within the family Orchidaceae, which comprises the orchid plants. This species is a member of the genus Platanthera, commonly known as the bog orchids. It is further categorized as a terrestrial orchid, growing in wet environments such as bogs and marshes. The classification of Platanthera psycodes is also supported by its distinctive floral characteristics and growth habits. This classification helps identify and differentiate the species from other similar orchid species within the same family.
